name: company-data-enricher
title: Company Data Enricher - Free B2B Lead Enrichment
description: Free Clearbit & ZoomInfo alternative. Enrich company data by domain: website metadata, social links (LinkedIn, Twitter), tech stack (28 technologies), contact info, and RDAP domain registration. Search companies via Wikidata. No API keys required. Bulk processing supported. Perfect for sales teams, growth hackers, and market researchers.
